# Prescription Benefit Solutions

> Independent pharmacy-benefits consulting for self-funded employers. Prescription Benefit Solutions audits PBM (pharmacy benefit manager) contracts and claims, develops protective contract language, and runs pharmacy benefit reviews. Founded and led by Ginny Crisp, PharmD. We review hundreds of PBM contracts a year. Charleston, SC. Contact: team@rxbs.org.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://www.rxbs.org/): what Prescription Benefit Solutions does and who it serves.
- [Solutions](https://www.rxbs.org/solutions): PBM contract audit, claims review, contract-language development, pharmacy benefit review, RFP/go-to-market, broker partnership.
- [Toolkit Library](https://www.rxbs.org/toolkit-library): 29 free printable plan-sponsor audit frameworks and decision tools.
- [About](https://www.rxbs.org/about): Ginny Crisp, PharmD, and the firm's independence (no PBM money, rebates, or spread).

## Answer pages (canonical references)
- [PBM Glossary](https://www.rxbs.org/glossary): plain-English definitions of PBM contract terms (spread pricing, GER, MAC, rebate aggregator, DIR, audit rights, and more).
- [PBM Contract Language Library](https://www.rxbs.org/contract-language-library): side-by-side weak vs. protective PBM contract language, continuously updated.
- [What We're Seeing](https://www.rxbs.org/what-we-are-seeing): aggregate findings from Prescription Benefit Solutions' 2025 contract reviews (203 clients, $78.7M contracted savings).
- [Guide: What Is a PBM Contract Audit?](https://www.rxbs.org/guides/pbm-contract-audit): what an independent audit examines and how to start.
- [Guide: What Is Spread Pricing?](https://www.rxbs.org/guides/what-is-spread-pricing): how spread hides in aggregate guarantees and the contract language that prevents it.
- [Guide: How to Choose a PBM Auditor](https://www.rxbs.org/guides/how-to-choose-a-pbm-auditor): decision criteria for self-funded employers, and why independence matters.
- [Compare: PBM Audit vs. Broker Review](https://www.rxbs.org/guides/pbm-audit-vs-broker-review): how the two reviews differ and complement each other.
- [FAQ: Questions Plan Sponsors Ask](https://www.rxbs.org/faq): straight answers for CFOs, HR leaders, and brokers.
- [Insights & Resources](https://www.rxbs.org/insights): the content hub.

## Free toolkits (lead magnets, all free)
- [Contract Review Readiness Checklist](https://www.rxbs.org/toolkit/contract-review-readiness): 8 documents to pull and 15 audits to run before a PBM contract review.
- [Optimize vs. Go-to-Market Decision Framework](https://www.rxbs.org/toolkit/optimize-vs-go-to-market): renegotiate the current PBM or run an RFP.
- [Pharmacy Benefit Review Framework](https://www.rxbs.org/toolkit/pbr-framework): the twice-yearly six-category plan-sponsor review.
- [Channel Pricing Audit Worksheet](https://www.rxbs.org/toolkit/channel-pricing): surface spread across retail, mail, and specialty.
- [PBM Compensation Audit Worksheet](https://www.rxbs.org/toolkit/pbm-compensation): map the five revenue streams flowing from a plan to its PBM.

## Key concepts Prescription Benefit Solutions explains
- Spread pricing, guaranteed effective rate (GER), MAC lists, rebate aggregators, channel/spread, PBM compensation streams, ERISA fiduciary duty for pharmacy benefits, carve-in vs carve-out, biosimilar readiness.

## Content
- The Pharmacy Benefits Briefing (LinkedIn newsletter, weekly).
- [Benefit Blind Spots](https://benefitblindspots.substack.com) (Substack): deep dives, field notes, and the free PBM Contract Language Library.
